notes: Click fraud protection is the flagship high-intent, high-CPC service and gets its own high-priority campaign with exact match and aggressive bidding, while negative keywords, scripts/automation, landing pages, and small business management round out a broader Google Ads management campaign at medium priority. Strict negative-keyword siloing between click fraud terms, negative keyword terms, script terms, and landing page terms prevents cross-serving across the five distinct intents.
